author: D23 RSS
text:
Behind the Scenes of Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu

Stars Pedro Pascal and Sigourney Weaver; co-writer/producer Dave Filoni; and director/co-writer/producer Disney Legend Jon Favreau take us inside the making of the new film.

The post Behind the Scenes of <em>Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu</em> appeared first on D23.
